steps.title: Identify what Text 2 presents
steps.content: Text 2 describes a completed solution—organizations have already developed global definitions and the “degree of urbanization” measure with uniform criteria for settlements.

steps.title: Match the response to the choices
steps.content: The author responds by noting a solution is available. The other three either call for further investigation, suggest abandoning the topic, or deepen the problem. The answer is D.
